features.jsHtml:
function calc(a: number, b: number): number {
  const sum = a + b;
  const eq = a === b ? 1 : 0;
  const both = a > 0 && b > 0 ? 1 : 0;
  return sum + eq + both;
}

features.jsHtml:
function firstPair(n: number): number {
  outer: for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
      if (i !== j) break outer;
    }
  }
  return 0;
}

features.name: arguments object (full)
features.description: Legacy arguments — partial, rest params preferred
features.explain: The full arguments object is partially supported. Rest parameters (...args) are preferred and fully compiled.
features.jsHtml:
function legacy(): number {
  return arguments.length;
}
// prefer rest params: (...args)

features.name: eval()
features.js: eval("1 + 2"); // not supported
features.explain: Requires a JS engine at runtime. Not possible in AOT compilation.
features.jsHtml: eval("1 + 2"); // not supported

features.name: with statement
features.js: with (obj) { x; } // not supported
features.explain: Disallowed in strict mode. All modules run strict.
features.jsHtml: with (obj) { x; } // not supported

class Point {
  x: number;
  y: number;
  constructor(x: number, y: number) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
  }
  dist(): number {
    return Math.sqrt(this.x * this.x + this.y * this.y);
  }
}

    i32.const 1
    global.set 1
  )

features.name: Promise.withResolvers
features.description: Create a Promise with exposed resolve/reject functions
features.js: const { promise, resolve, reject } = Promise.withResolvers(); // not yet
features.explain: Promise infrastructure not yet fully implemented.
features.jsHtml: const { promise, resolve, reject } = Promise.withResolvers(); // not yet

features.name: Resizable ArrayBuffer
features.description: ArrayBuffer that can grow or shrink after creation
features.js: const buf = new ArrayBuffer(8, { maxByteLength: 1024 }); // not yet
features.explain: Requires Wasm memory growth integration.
features.jsHtml: const buf = new ArrayBuffer(8, { maxByteLength: 1024 }); // not yet

features.name: RegExp v flag
features.description: Enhanced Unicode set notation in regular expressions
features.js: const re = /[p{Letter}&&p{ASCII}]/v; // not yet
features.explain: Requires v-flag Unicode set support in the regex engine.
features.jsHtml: const re = /[p{Letter}&&p{ASCII}]/v; // not yet

features.name: Set methods (union, intersection, difference)
features.explain: Set method extensions not yet implemented.
features.jsHtml:
const a = new Set([1, 2, 3]);
const b = new Set([2, 3, 4]);
const union = a.union(b); // not yet

features.name: Iterator helpers (map, filter, take)
features.js: [1, 2, 3].values().map((x: number) => x * 2).take(2); // not yet
features.explain: Iterator protocol helpers not yet implemented.
features.jsHtml: [1, 2, 3].values().map((x: number) => x * 2).take(2); // not yet

features.name: RegExp duplicate named groups
features.description: Same named capture groups across alternatives
features.explain: Requires regex engine support for duplicate group names.
features.jsHtml: const re = /(?<y>d{4})-(?<m>d{2})|(?<m>d{2})/(?<y>d{4})/v; // not yet

features.name: var hoisting
features.description: Function-scoped var declarations hoisted to function top
features.explain: var declarations are hoisted. Full TDZ semantics for let/const.
features.wat:
(func $hoisted (result f64)
    (local $x f64)
    local.get 0
    call 0
    f64.const 5
    local.set 0
    local.get 0
    return
  )
features.jsHtml:
function hoisted(): number {
  console.log(x); // undefined (hoisted)
  var x = 5;
  return x;
}
features.watHtml:
(func $hoisted (result f64)
    (local $x f64)
    local.get 0
    call 0
    f64.const 5
    local.set 0
    local.get 0
    return
  )

features.name: arguments.callee
features.description: Reference to the currently executing function
features.explain: Forbidden in strict mode. Use named function expressions instead.
features.jsHtml:
(function factorial(n) {
  return n <= 1 ? 1 : n * arguments.callee(n - 1);
})(5); // not supported

features.name: __proto__ accessor
features.js:
const obj = {};
obj.__proto__ = protoObj; // not supported
features.explain: Prototype mutation not emitted in WasmGC struct hierarchy.
features.jsHtml:
const obj = {};
obj.__proto__ = protoObj; // not supported

features.name: String.prototype.substr
features.js: "hello".substr(1, 3); // not yet
features.explain: Deprecated. Use String.prototype.slice instead.
features.jsHtml: "hello".substr(1, 3); // not yet

features.name: Octal literals (0777)
features.description: Legacy octal integer syntax (use 0o prefix instead)
features.js: const n = 0777; // not supported in strict mode
features.explain: Forbidden in strict mode. Use 0o prefix: 0o777.
features.jsHtml: const n = 0777; // not supported in strict mode

features.name: escape() / unescape()
features.js: escape("hello world"); // not supported
features.explain: Deprecated globals. Use encodeURIComponent / decodeURIComponent.
features.jsHtml: escape("hello world"); // not supported

features.name: Function.prototype.caller
features.description: Reference to the function that called the current function
features.js: function f() { return f.caller; } // not supported
features.explain: Forbidden in strict mode. Call stacks not inspectable in Wasm.
features.jsHtml: function f() { return f.caller; } // not supported

features.name: HTML string methods (.bold(), .anchor())
features.description: Legacy String methods wrapping HTML tags
features.js: "hello".bold(); // not supported
features.explain: Deprecated HTML wrapper methods. Use DOM APIs directly.
features.jsHtml: "hello".bold(); // not supported

features.name: RegExp.$1 static properties
features.description: Static capture group properties on RegExp constructor
features.js:
/(d+)/.test("abc123");
const match = RegExp.$1; // not supported
features.explain: Legacy static properties on RegExp not implemented.
features.jsHtml:
/(d+)/.test("abc123");
const match = RegExp.$1; // not supported

features.name: Temporal
features.js: const now = Temporal.Now.plainDateTimeISO(); // not supported
features.jsHtml: const now = Temporal.Now.plainDateTimeISO(); // not supported

features.name: Decorators
features.description: Syntax for class and method metadata annotation
features.explain: Stage 3 proposal. Decorator transform not yet in scope.
features.jsHtml:
@sealed
class Foo {
  @log
  method() {}
} // not yet

features.name: Pattern matching
features.description: Structural pattern matching with match expression
features.explain: Stage 1 proposal. Structural pattern matching not yet in scope.
features.jsHtml:
const result = match (value) {
  when ({ type: "a" }): "A";
  when ({ type: "b" }): "B";
}; // not yet
